items.title: 2026/578: Methodist Church, Hurstlands, Hurst Green, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0HG
items.description: Demolition of deconsecrated church building. Redevelopment of former methodist church site to provide a four-storey block of sixteen flats, comprising six one-bedroom flats, eight two-bedroom flats and two three-bedroom flats
items.headline: Plans to Replace Hurst Green Church With Flats
items.summary: A planning application proposes demolishing the deconsecrated Methodist Church on Hurstlands and building a four-storey block of sixteen flats. The scheme would provide six one-bedroom, eight two-bedroom and two three-bedroom homes.

data.address: Methodist Church, Hurstlands, Hurst Green, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0HG

items.summary: A planning application proposes splitting the garden at Foyle Cottage on Red Lane and building three detached houses. The plans also include new landscaping, parking and vehicle access.

items.title: 2026/743/TPO: 8 Farley Park, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 9HY
items.description:
Please refer to photos provided: 
T1) - Red Oak on right-hand side of front garden - To crown reduce to previous points, removing up to 2m growth to a residual height of 14m and crown spread of 11m. Crown lifted to 5m from ground level over road and 2.5m over garden / driveway. Removing limbs <10cm dia. Repeat pruning for good arboricultural management.
items.headline: Tree work planned for protected oak in Farley Park
items.summary: A plan has been submitted to prune a red oak in the front garden of 8 Farley Park, Oxted. The work would reduce the tree's crown by up to 2 metres and lift its lower branches to keep growth in check.

data.address: 8 Farley Park, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 9HY

items.headline: Tree work sought for damaged pine branch at Limpsfield home
items.summary: A planning application has been submitted to prune a protected Corsican pine at Hunters End on Uvedale Road, Limpsfield. The lowest branch has twisted and half broken, and now hangs over the property, so the owner wants it cut back to the main stem.
